title: centaurea bruguieriana
intro: Centaurea bruguieriana, also known as the Cornflower or Blue Cornflower, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. Centaurea bruguieriana is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural healers.
